source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth abdominal-pain documentation; partial where the baseline workflow has no adult-only filter or telehealth restriction.
